LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CENTER FOR SELF-IMPROVEMENT AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT, INC AND MINISTER CHRISTOPHER MUHAMMAD'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT BY ALL DEFENDANTS AGAINST PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. CLAIMS ARISING BEFORE MARCH 30, 2005 ARE BARRED BY THE 4-YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO STATE FACTS SHOWING DEFENDANT MUHAMMAD IS PROPERLY JOINED AS AN INDIVIDUAL OR THAT PIERCING THE CORPORATE VEIL IS APPROPRIATE. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE A BREACH OF CONTRACT AS THE RENT PROVISION ALLOWS FOR AN OFFSET OF OPERATING EXPENSES AGAINST THE RENT AND PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ALLEGE THESE EXPENSES FELL UNDER $2,000. PLAINTIFF HAS 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FROM DATE ORDER SIGNED. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CENTER FOR SELF-IMPROVEMENT AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT, INC. AND MINISTER CHRISTOPHER MUHAMMAD'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT BY ALL DEFENDANTS AGAINST PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY.
APPEARANCES: Bill Ford, Esq. 241-1027 for pltf & opposing party; James R. Wheaton, Esq. of Law Offices of James Wheaton 510/208-4554 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. CLAIMS ARISING BEFORE MARCH 30, 2005 ARE BARRED BY THE 4-YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO STATE FACTS SHOWING DEFENDANT MUHAMMAD IS PROPERLY JOINED AS AN INDIVIDUAL OR THAT PIERCING THE CORPORATE VEIL IS APPROPRIATE. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE A BREACH OF CONTRACT AS THE RENT PROVISION ALLOWS FOR AN OFFSET OF OPERATING EXPENSES AGAINST THE RENT AND PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ALLEGE THESE EXPENSES FELL UNDER $2,000. Plaintiff has 10 days leave to amend from date order signed. Defendant to prepare proposed form of order. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Text Ruling

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Moving party has re-noticed its demurrer for June 16, 2009. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CENTER FOR SELF IMPROVEMENT AND COMMUNITY, and, CHRISTOPHER MUHAMMAD DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.Appearances: Jamess Leonard, Esq. Staff Attorney, First Amendment Project, (510) 208-7744 appearing for Defendants and moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and rules that the matter is off calendar. Moving party has re-noticed its demurrer for June 16, 2009. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
